title: Skew
description: Screen distortion shader with animated skew and subtle camera shake.
body:
[![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1321365/description_19767e94-ef82-4569-92c6-b1e8b60e6e07.png)](https://discord.gg/XgH4EpyPD2)

> *Subtle instability. Dynamic motion. Zero gameplay impact.*

This lightweight post-processing shader adds animated screen distortion, directional skew, and camera-like shake to create a more intense and immersive visual experience. Designed for OptiFine and Iris compatibility, it runs entirely as a fullscreen effect with minimal performance overhead.

![Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ijajuutw/images/fc0c2b2c8cb11b881457c3bf9c3500468455e21b.png)
-
![Me](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ijajuutw/images/f935428cf35b5fb7d4ee9456f7e29d98ada71e84.png)

### ✨ Features

**Animated Screen Skew**
A time-varying shear transformation subtly bends the image horizontally and vertically, creating a dynamic sense of movement without becoming distracting.

**Micro Camera Shake**
Procedural jitter introduces tiny camera movements that make the scene feel less static. Scaled by screen resolution to remain consistent across devices.

**Dynamic Rotation**
A gentle rolling motion adds natural instability and prevents the effect from feeling mechanically repetitive.

**Scanline-Based Distortion**
A lightweight horizontal wobble effect simulates slight signal interference and enhances motion intensity during gameplay.

**Procedural Noise**
Texture-free hash noise drives the shake system, ensuring smooth animation with virtually no additional resource usage.

**Safe Edge Handling**
UV clamping prevents artifacting and edge stretching on drivers that struggle with out-of-bounds texture sampling.

---
![Zombiew](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ijajuutw/images/a286113be755b66dc5bef996bab459b76093ad5e.png)
---

### ⚙️ Technical Details

|                        |                 |
| ---------------------- | --------------- |
| **GLSL Version**       | `#version 120`  |
| **Shader Type**        | Post-Processing |
| **Pipeline**           | Composite       |
| **Performance Impact** | Very Low        |
| **Compatibility**      | OptiFine / Iris |

---

### 🎛️ Included Effects

Animated skew · screen distortion · procedural jitter · micro shake · rotational drift · scanline wobble · edge-safe texture sampling

*Built for lightweight cinematic motion and enhanced visual intensity.*
